name: Ghost Mountain Roller Coaster
short_description: Ghost Mountain is an epic 12 minutes long virtual reality roller coaster ride in a dark underground mine, filled with dreamlike scenery and magical, abstract landscapes, with fast and slow sections, indoor and outdoor areas and many surprises.
detailed_description: Take a minecart ride in a haunted gold mine under the infamous Ghost Mountain. What awaits you inside is magic, mystery, death... and redemption! Ghost Mountain is an epic 12 minutes long roller coaster ride in a dark underground mine, filled with dreamlike scenery and magical, abstract landscapes, with fast and slow sections, indoor and outdoor areas and many surprises.
about_the_game: Take a minecart ride in a haunted gold mine under the infamous Ghost Mountain. What awaits you inside is magic, mystery, death... and redemption! Ghost Mountain is an epic 12 minutes long roller coaster ride in a dark underground mine, filled with dreamlike scenery and magical, abstract landscapes, with fast and slow sections, indoor and outdoor areas and many surprises.
